description_long: This house features a modern suburban design with a mix of brick and light-colored exterior walls, complemented by a flat and slightly sloped roof structure. The front yard includes a driveway with two parked cars, a manicured lawn, and two prominent trees—one with purple foliage and another with green. The rear of the house showcases a large circular above-ground pool and a small shed, with paved walkways and a patio area. Multiple large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and a sense of openness. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a tiered effect. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between living, recreational, and utility areas.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, front lawn, and a backyard featuring a pool and shed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entrance, large windows, and landscaped lawn with two trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, side lawn, and partial view of the pool and shed in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a circular pool, small shed, patio area, and multiple glass doors and windows.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool, shed, driveway, and the transition between the front and back yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and a paved path leading from the driveway, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
